name: @vexa/join
description: The isolated meeting-joining layer (Google Meet + MS Teams + Zoom web client + Jitsi Meet): enter a meeting and observe its admission verdict. The embedder hands in a Playwright Page and watches JoinState through hooks; recording, transcription, redis, and meeting-api callbacks all live OUTSIDE this boundary (zero coupling to the bot core).

scripts.test: tsx src/shared/selector-validity.test.ts && tsx src/googlemeet/admission.test.ts && tsx src/googlemeet/humanized/humanized.test.ts && tsx src/msteams/modals.test.ts && tsx src/zoom/join.test.ts && tsx src/jitsi/join.test.ts && tsx src/jitsi/password.test.ts && tsx src/jitsi/admission.test.ts
